C) shows expressions of trait for several
generations
D) all of these

traits of pea plant studied by Mendel.

15. Which technique was used by Mendel
during his experiments on pea plant? (Pg.
70, E)
A) Artificial pollination
B) Cross pollination
C) Self-pollination
D) All of these
16. Choose the correct statement(s) from the
following. (Pg. 70, M)
(I) During Mendel’s investigation,
statistical analysis and mathematical
logic were applied to problems in
Biology.
